notes: TCGplayer study over 700+ packs (relayed by Game Rant), shared across Black Bolt and White Flare: double rare 21.11% and ultra rare 5.83% in the rare slot; illustration rare 16.39% and special illustration rare 1.25% replacing the second reverse-holo slot. Black White Rare rate was undetermined by TCGplayer; 1/496 packs taken from Dripshop's 1,800-pack analysis. Poke Ball (30.56%) and Master Ball (5.14%) foils are foil commons/uncommons, modeled with the plain common/uncommon ids per repo convention. No ACE SPEC cards. No English 36-pack booster box exists for this special set (ETB, booster bundles, mini-tins only).
